Available dogs

Meet the dogs when the notes are ready.

Available dogs change often. Profiles should show the real dog: personality, needs, photos, and the kind of home that will help them succeed.

Learn about adoption Email adoption

Current status

Ask for today's adoptable dogs.

Before a dog gets a public profile, we verify the details that matter: name, age, personality, care needs, household fit, and current photos. Until then, start with the adoption page or email the adoption inbox.

Who this dog isWhat they needHome fitCare notesCurrent photosHow to apply
Read about adopting
Ways to help

It takes community.

01 Adopt Start with the dog in front of you, then we help decide whether the fit is right. 02 Foster Give a dog a calm place to land while they get ready for adoption. 03 Volunteer Help with walks, transport, care, events, photos, admin, or remote support. 04 Donate One-time and monthly gifts both matter. No amount is too small to help.
Underdog Heroes

Dog rescue for abused, neglected, and overlooked dogs who deserve a fighting chance.

Adopt: Adopt@underdogheroes.org Foster: Foster@underdogheroes.org Volunteer: info@underdogheroes.org Instagram
